name: claude-code
description: A marketplace with my Claude Code plugins

plugins.name: canary-update
plugins.description: Automates canary-types schema updates and propagates changes across the codebase

plugins.name: markdown-new
plugins.description: Teach Claude to use markdown.new for web content fetching, reducing token usage by ~80% compared to raw HTML

plugins.name: notion-doc
plugins.description: Generate Qogita project documents from design docs following the Notion PRD template

plugins.name: chezmoi
plugins.description: Chezmoi dotfiles management — reference knowledge and dependency workflows

plugins.name: tutor
plugins.description: Personalized learning system with adaptive tutoring, course creation, and progress tracking

plugins.name: travel-planner
plugins.description: Trip planning with Obsidian integration — researches destinations, creates itineraries, location/country/region notes, budgets, and packing lists
